changeSet.author: Mariia
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.events (session_id, event_type, page_url, page_title, element_selector, element_text, element_role, event_data, sequence_number, recorded_at) VALUES (1, N'navigate', rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.events WHERE session_id IN (SELECT id FROM dbo.sessions WHERE created_at = '2026-03-01 06:00:00');
